title: erysimum cheiranthus subsp. pumilum
intro: Erysimum cheiranthus subsp. pumilum, also known as the dwarf wallflower, is a plant species within the Brassicaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The plant's medicinal properties have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Erysimum cheiranthus subsp. pumilum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
